body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->

updates dependabot.yml to ignore gh agentic workflow updates. Updating those deps without recompiling will cause the agentic workflow to fail.

Also updates the pr-review workflow
title: Tr/dependabot ignore

body:

Closes #4531
title: Update to latest ClimaCore
